zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Williamson於1669年11月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可時，她的父親Andrew Williamson28歲，母親Sarah King19歲。她於1691年與Curtis Land在美國維吉尼亞州素可結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1740年9月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿爾貝馬爾格林伍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Williamson于1669年11月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可时，她的父亲Andrew Williamson28岁，母亲Sarah King19岁。她于1691年与Curtis Land在美国弗吉尼亚州素可结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1740年9月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利阿爾貝馬爾 帕里什享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州阿爾貝馬爾格林伍德。

nameMeanings.name: Williamson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northern) and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name William + patronymic -son ‘son of William’. This surname is also found in Northern Ireland (Ulster), especially in Antrim.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Wilhelmsen , Swedish Wilhelmsson, or Dutch and North German Willemsen , all cognates of 1.

History: This surname was brought to North America from northern England and northern Ireland independently by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. Timothy Williamson is recorded in Plymouth Colony in 1643.

variants.name: Willamson
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Williamson  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Williamson was born on 1 November 1669, in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Andrew Williamson, was 28 and her mother, Sarah King, was 19. She married Curtis Land in 1691, in Sussex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 September 1740, in Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Williamson est née le 1 novembre 1669, à Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Andrew Williamson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah King, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Curtis Land en 1691, à Sussex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 septembre 1740, à Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Williamson am 1. November 1669 in Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Williamson 28 und ihre Mutter Sarah King 19. Sie hat 1691 in Sussex, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Curtis Land geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. September 1740 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Williamson è nata il il 1 novembre 1669 nel Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Andrew Williamson, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Sarah King, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Curtis Land nel 1691, nel Sussex, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 settembre 1740, nel Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Williamsonが1669年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスで生まれた時，父Andrew Williamsonは28歳，母Sarah Kingは19歳であった。1691年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州スセックスでCurtis Landと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1740年9月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スリーアルベマルル パーイッシュで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アルベマルルグレエンウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Williamson(이)가 1669년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Williamson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah King(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1691년 미국 버지니아 주 수세스에서 Curtis Land(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1740년 9월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리 알브마일 파리시에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 알브마일 그린우드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Williamson nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1669, em Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Andrew Williamson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah King, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Curtis Land em 1691, em Sussex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de setembro de 1740, em Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Williamson родилась 1 ноября 1669 г. в местности миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Andrew Williamson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah King, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Curtis Land в 1691 г. в местности суссекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 сентября 1740 г. в местности альбемарл пэриш, сурри, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности гринвуд, альбемарл, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Williamson nació el 1 de noviembre de 1669, en Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Andrew Williamson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah King, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Curtis Land en 1691, en Sussex, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de septiembre de 1740, en Albemarle Parish, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Greenwood, Albemarle, Virginia, British Colonial America.
